title: licania turiuva
intro: Licania turiuva, also known as the Turiuva tree or Licania, is a plant species that belongs to the family of Sapindaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Licania turiuva are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat various skin problems due to its antiseptic properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, or extracts, which can be consumed as teas or taken as supplements.
